creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
gabor       2007-02-02 13:53:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/aolserver-nscache Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Tcl interface to AOLserver's caching API
  
  AOLserver implements a C API for caching arbitrary data. This module provides
  a Tcl API on top of the C API. The module is only compatible with AOLserver 3.x
  using nsd8x, or AOLserver 4.x.
  
  WWW: http://www.aolserver.com/
  
  - Martin Matuska
  martin@matuska.org
  
  PR:             ports/105781
  Submitted by:   Martin Matuska <martin@matuska.org>
  Approved by:    erwin (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1698    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +45 -0     ports/www/aolserver-nscache/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/aolserver-nscache/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/www/aolserver-nscache/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/aolserver-nscache/pkg-plist (new)
